title: A Personal Message from Our Dentist
quote: I enjoy helping people get healthier. We recognize that many of the procedures and materials that are used in dentistry can detract from a person's health and longevity. We strive to ensure your long-term health.

seo.title: A Message from Dr. Clark | Amity Gentle Dental
seo.description: A personal message from Dr. Chester Clark about health-focused dentistry.
